entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop grown by urban farmers in Niamey

entities.name: NIAMEY COMMUNE V
entities.description: An urban area in the Niamey region of Niger

entities.name: THE SAHEL
entities.description: The semi-arid region of Africa where the study is located

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in climate patterns, specifically rainfall disruptions, in the Niamey region

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE PERCEPTIONS
entities.description: Farmers' awareness and understanding of climate change over 30 years

entities.name: ADAPTATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Measures adopted by farmers to cope with climate variability

entities.name: SNOWBALL SAMPLING
entities.description: Sampling technique used to select 150 pearl millet farmers

entities.name: STRUCTURED INTERVIEWS
entities.description: Data collection method used to gather socio-demographic and perception data

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: Qualitative data collection method used to identify adaptation strategies

entities.name: RAINFALL DATA ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of 30 years of rainfall data from 1991 to 2020

entities.name: DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS
entities.description: Statistical method used to describe the sample and findings

entities.name: STATISTICAL TESTS
entities.description: Methods used to identify determinants of adaptation strategy adoption

entities.name: MULTINOMIAL LOGISTIC REGRESSION
entities.description: Statistical model used to identify determinants of adaptation strategy adoption

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY REGENERATION TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Local practice used to improve soil quality as a climate adaptation

entities.name: CROP DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: Strategy of growing different crops to mitigate climate risk

entities.name: CROP DEFENSE
entities.description: Practices used to protect crops from climate-related threats

entities.name: IMPROVED SEEDS
entities.description: High-yielding or stress-tolerant seed varieties used for adaptation

entities.name: ORGANIC FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Natural fertilizers used to enhance soil productivity

entities.name: ADJUSTED PLANTING CALENDARS
entities.description: Changing the timing of planting to align with shifted rainfall patterns

entities.name: WATER CONSERVATION TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Practices used to optimize water use in urban agriculture

entities.name: PRAYERS OR RITUALS
entities.description: Cultural and spiritual coping mechanisms for climate change

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output level of pearl millet farming

entities.name: CLIMATE ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process of adjusting to actual or expected climate change

entities.name: MITIGATION
entities.description: Efforts to reduce or prevent the impact of climate change

entities.name: URBAN AGRICULTURE POLICY
entities.description: Policy framework for managing agriculture in urban settings

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION
entities.description: Timely data and warnings about climate patterns provided to farmers

entities.name: EXTENSION SERVICES
entities.description: Technical support and information provided to farmers by agricultural units

entities.name: URBAN PLANNING
entities.description: The technical and political process of land use in urban areas

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of urban agriculture to recover from climate shocks

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Development that meets current needs without compromising future generations
